positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a celestial forest, featuring giant, bioluminescent mushrooms and twisting, vine-covered trees. The central element is a small, floating airship made of salvaged wood and glowing lanterns, navigating through the canopy. The aesthetic should be highly detailed, reminiscent of vintage storybook engravings blended with modern psychedelic art. Use deep jewel tones—sapphire blues, emerald greens, and amethyst purples—accented by warm, glowing golden-yellow bioluminescence. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for a seamless repeat pattern on apparel. The style should be clean line art with crisp vector quality and dramatic rim lighting, printed on a matte background.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, copyright, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, cropped, out of frame, realistic photo, photorealism
